original_abstract: The use of the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah in learning Arabic at the Ar Riyadh Islamic boarding school because researchers found that students at the boarding school were heterogeneous, while the books used by teachers used many foreign words which were rarely used in everyday conversations. The objectives of this study are: 1) To find out how to use the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah in improving speaking skills at the Ar Riyadh Islamic boarding school. 2) Knowing how effective the use of the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah is in improving speaking skills at the Ar Riyadh Islamic boarding school. The approach used by researchers is a quantitative experimental approach. Because the researcher needs the big picture or to provide a numerical description that shows the approximation of this phenomenon, its size and degree of association with other phenomena. The data sources are teachers and students, data collection methods using observation, interviews, documentation and questionnaires. The results of this study can be concluded by the researchers as follows: 1) The use of the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah at the Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School is fairly good, this can be seen from 86% of students choosing to study using the book. 2) The use of the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah for students of class 1 “C” Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School has been effective, as evidenced by the results in the pre- and post-test of each group it has become clear to researchers that there is a statistically significant difference from each side, where the degree of T reached 5.38 for the experimental group.
humanized_abstract: This study is based on the fact that there are many differences in the backgrounds of students who are studying at the Ar Riyadh Islamic boarding school. Based on the information gathered by researcher, it appears that the current texts used by teachers contain many foreign words that are rarely used in contemporary Arabic language when communicating. Therefore, the objectives of this study are: 1) To determine ways and methods used in the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah to overcome the speaking skill of students at the Ar Riyadh Islamic boarding school. 2) To determine the extent to which the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah increases the speaking skill of students at the Ar Riyadh Islamic boarding school. This study used quantitative experimental approach by which the researcher must have an overall description or a numerical approximation of the phenomenon in order to determine the extent or degree of relationship of the variable with other variables. The source of the data in this study were teachers and students. The method of collecting the data used were observation, interviews, documentation and questionnaire. The result of the study, according to the researcher, are as follows: 1) the result of the use of the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah at the Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School showed that 86% of students chose to study Arabic using the book. 2) the result of the use of the book Hilal Fii Fann Lughah Al'Arabiyyah for students of class 1 “C” at the Ar Riyadh Islamic Boarding School showed that it was effective. This can be seen from the result of the pre-test and post-test for each group. The results of the calculation showed that there is a significant difference between the two test from each side. This means that the score of T has reached 5.38 for the experimental group.
